text:
9.30 → Branching in, Branching out — Notes on Learning with Catwings, on reading practices, being good enough hosts and learning. 
Until then → Ambient channles being wild
12.00 → 12.30 Spontaneous (not scheduled) music intervention with music selected by Dora!
14.00 → 15.00 Loud Places - Vento. Selezione musicale di Michele Faleschini
15.00 → 16.00 Aljaž, v živo: Mejenje epizoda 24. Danes o drugosti otroka! {v slovenščini}
